headline: Couple's 'Relationship Goals' Video Is Filmed, Staged, And Completely Fake, Internet Not Fooled
summary: The video has 2 million views and 1.9 million comments saying 'this seems rehearsed.'
fullBody: Megan and Jake FauxLove posted a 'candid' relationship goals video: laughing in bed, feeding each other fruit, staring into each other's eyes. It took 47 takes. 'We wanted it to feel natural,' Megan said. It did not. The internet called them out. 'This is staged,' one comment read. 'The fruit was a paid actor,' read another. Megan and Jake are now 'taking a break from social media.' They've also taken a break from each other.
